# Site Experience Atlas v37

GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension now has a complete intent-first navigation system.

## Goals

- keep every existing page and demonstration available;
- replace the crowded link cloud with clear global navigation;
- give non-technical users a fast path;
- give advanced users a complete atlas;
- make legal, privacy, AGIALPHA, and expert-operation boundaries visible;
- preserve the dependency-zero, pathspec-proof, public-safe publication pipeline.

## Added

- `experience-atlas.html`
- `assets/site-nav.css`
- `assets/site-nav.js`
- `assets/experience-atlas.css`
- `assets/experience-atlas.js`
- `data/site-experience-atlas.json`
- `schemas/site-experience-atlas.schema.json`

## Public-safe boundary

The navigation system does not use accounts, forms, analytics, cookies, wallet connection, localStorage, sessionStorage, external network calls, token approval, transaction broadcast, or production authority.
